glosses.vi: nhà ăn; căn tin đại học

sentences.target: Ich esse heute in der Mensa.

translations.de: Ich esse heute in der Mensa.
translations.en: I'm eating in the cafeteria today.
translations.fr: Je mange à la cafétéria aujourd'hui.
translations.vi: Hôm nay tôi ăn ở căng-tin.
translations.nl: Ik eet vandaag in de kantine.
translations.hi: मैं आज कैफेटेरिया में खा रहा हूँ।
translations.nb: Jeg spiser i kantina i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini aku makan di kantin.
translations.da: Jeg spiser i kantinen i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は食堂で食べます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular, nominative; subject.
Finite main verb; present tense, 1st person singular.
Temporal adverb indicating the time frame.
Preposition of location; selects dative (static); heads the PP.
Definite article; feminine singular, dative; agrees with ‘Mensa’.
Common noun; feminine; dative singular as object of the preposition ‘in’.

sentences.target: Wir treffen uns später vor der Mensa.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛfən ʊns ˈʃpɛːtɐ foːɐ̯ deːɐ ˈmɛnza/

translations.de: Wir treffen uns später vor der Mensa.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈtʁɛfən ʊns ˈʃpɛːtɐ foːɐ̯ deːɐ ˈmɛnza/
translations.en: We'll meet later in front of the cafeteria.
translations.es: Nos vemos más tarde frente a la cafetería.
translations.fr: On se retrouve plus tard devant la cafétéria.
translations.it: Ci vediamo più tardi davanti alla mensa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们稍后在食堂门口见面。
translations.yue: 我哋遲啲喺飯堂門口見。
translations.pt: A gente se encontra mais tarde em frente à cantina.
translations.vi: Lát nữa mình gặp nhau trước căng-tin.
translations.nl: We zien elkaar later voor de kantine.
translations.hi: हम बाद में कैफेटेरिया के सामने मिलेंगे।
translations.el: Θα συναντηθούμε αργότερα μπροστά από την καντίνα.
translations.id: Nanti kita bertemu di depan kantin.
translations.ro: Ne vedem mai târziu în fața cantinei.
translations.ja: 後で食堂の前で会おう。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural, nominative; subject.
Finite main verb; present tense, 1st person plural.
Personal/reflexive pronoun; 1st person plural, accusative; direct object coreferential with the subject (‘sich treffen’ construction).
Temporal adverb (comparative form) indicating a later time.
Preposition of spatial relation; selects dative; heads the PP.
Definite article; feminine singular, dative; agrees with ‘Mensa’.
Common noun; feminine; dative singular as object of the preposition ‘vor’.

sentences.target: Die Mensa ist heute ungewöhnlich leer.

translations.de: Die Mensa ist heute ungewöhnlich leer.
translations.en: The cafeteria is unusually empty today.
translations.es: Hoy la cafetería está más vacía de lo normal.
translations.fr: Aujourd'hui, la cafétéria est plus vide que d'habitude.
translations.it: Oggi la mensa è più vuota del solito.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天食堂比平时空很多。
translations.yue: 今日飯堂出奇地冇乜人。
translations.pt: Hoje a cantina está mais vazia do que o normal.
translations.tr: Bugün yemekhane her zamankinden daha boş.
translations.vi: Hôm nay căng-tin vắng hơn thường lệ.
translations.ar: الكافتيريا اليوم فارغة على غير العادة.
translations.nl: De kantine is vandaag leger dan normaal.
translations.hi: आज कैफेटेरिया सामान्य से ज्यादा खाली है।
translations.pl: Dzisiaj w stołówce jest wyjątkowo pusto.
translations.el: Σήμερα η καντίνα είναι πιο άδεια από το συνηθισμένο.
translations.nb: Kantina er uvanlig tom i dag.
translations.id: Hari ini kantin lebih sepi dari biasanya.
translations.ro: Astăzi cantina e mai goală decât de obicei.
translations.da: Kantinen er usædvanligt tom i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は食堂がいつもよりガラガラだ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; feminine singular, nominative; marks the subject noun.
Common noun; feminine; nominative singular; subject.
Copula auxiliary; present tense, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicate.
Temporal adverb giving the time frame.
Degree adverb/intensifier; modifies the predicate adjective ‘leer’.
Predicate adjective; positive degree; complements the copula ‘ist’.

sentences.target: Mein Kaffee schmeckt in der Mensa besser.
sentences.reading: /maɪn ˈkafeː ʃmɛkt ɪn deːɐ ˈmɛnza ˈbɛsɐ/

translations.de: Mein Kaffee schmeckt in der Mensa besser.
translations.ipa: /maɪn ˈkafeː ʃmɛkt ɪn deːɐ ˈmɛnza ˈbɛsɐ/
translations.en: My coffee tastes better in the cafeteria.
translations.es: Mi café sabe mejor en la cafetería.
translations.fr: Mon café est meilleur à la cafétéria.
translations.it: Il mio caffè è più buono in mensa.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在食堂喝的咖啡更好喝。
translations.yue: 我喺飯堂飲嘅咖啡更好飲。
translations.pt: Meu café é mais gostoso na cantina.
translations.vi: Cà phê tôi uống ở căng-tin ngon hơn.
translations.nl: Mijn koffie smaakt beter in de kantine.
translations.hi: मेरी कॉफी कैफेटेरिया में ज़्यादा स्वादिष्ट लगती है।
translations.pl: Moja kawa smakuje lepiej w stołówce.
translations.el: Ο καφές μου είναι πιο νόστιμος στην καντίνα.
translations.nb: Kaffen min smaker bedre i kantina.
translations.id: Kopi saya lebih enak di kantin.
translations.sv: Mitt kaffe smakar bättre i matsalen.
translations.ro: Cafeaua mea e mai bună la cantină.
translations.cs: Moje káva chutná lépe v jídelně.
translations.da: Min kaffe smager bedre i kantinen.
translations.ja: 食堂で飲むコーヒーのほうがおいしい。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; 1st person singular possessor; agrees with masculine nominative singular noun ‘Kaffee’.
Common noun; masculine; nominative singular; subject.
Finite main verb; present tense, 3rd person singular.
Preposition of location; selects dative (static); heads the PP.
Definite article; feminine singular, dative; agrees with ‘Mensa’.
Common noun; feminine; dative singular as object of the preposition ‘in’.
Comparative adverb; modifies ‘schmeckt’; comparative of ‘gut’.
